Actions.Text: REFERRED TO NEW YORK CITY EDUCATION

Title: Establishes water safety swim instruction and free swim lessons in schools in a city with a population of one million or more
Summary: Establishes a water safety swim instructor certification exam and water safety swim instruction and free swim lessons in schools in a city with a population of one million or more.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the education law, in relation to establishing water safety swim instruction and free swim lessons in schools in a city with a population of one million or more
